fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 79 incorrectly identifies cases where the last element is shared between both lists, causing line 80 to erroneously remove a required duplicate element.

spec.expr: not (merged and left and right and merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: The condition that triggers removal of a shared last element should never be true.
Before the final incorrect adjustment, the merged list must contain all elements.
The branch that removes a duplicate last element should never be executed.
The final list must contain all elements from both inputs combined.
